hero_subtitle: SFTY structures KYC and KYB workflows to preserve audit evidence and connect compliance cases, enabling VASPs to streamline review and support regulatory audit readiness.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow

problem_title: KYC and KYB evidence lacks audit readiness
problem_description: Compliance teams struggle with incomplete and scattered KYC and KYB audit evidence across multiple disconnected providers. This fragmentation delays review processes and weakens the ability to trace and defend compliance decisions during regulatory audits.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates KYC and KYB provider outputs, review actions, decision logs and supporting documents into one audit-ready workflow designed for compliance teams preparing regulatory evidence.
workflow_title: From KYC and KYB checks to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY collects provider results and routes reviews to create structured cases with decisions and preserved evidence for compliance audit readiness.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond scattered evidence. Review-ready audit control
why_sfty_description: SFTY connects KYC and KYB outputs into structured cases, decisions and evidence to support clear audit trails and defensible compliance review for digital asset teams.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view

authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs preparing audit-ready KYC and KYB evidence with controlled provider orchestration, clear bank due diligence and enterprise-grade deployment governance.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows preserve KYC and KYB evidence
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how audit-ready evidence supports regulatory compliance reviews

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance teams?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides compliance teams a connected layer connecting KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule, case management and reporting into structured, auditable workflows across digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY handle KYC and KYB workflows?
faq_2_answer: SFTY orchestrates KYC and KYB provider outputs by routing identity, corporate and risk checks into rule-based review workflows with audit trails and case evidence for consistent decisions.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves decision records, case history and supporting evidence in audit-ready packages to support teams can trace and defend compliance actions during regulatory and bank reviews.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing compliance providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY sits above existing providers and integrates their outputs into one platform, allowing controlled, policy-driven workflows without needing to replace current compliance tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC, KYB or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No, SFTY does not replace underlying KYC, KYB or KYT providers but connects their outputs to create structured workflows, evidence packages and regulatory reports.
final_title: Prepare KYC and KYB evidence for audit review
final_description: Review how SFTY connects provider outputs into structured cases, evidence packages and audit-ready compliance workflows for VASPs.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
